title: Master Transformer Section
description: Validates master.transformer.* per spec § 5.4. Owned exclusively by comp-team-transformer. Other skills MUST NOT write to this section.

schema_version.description: Per-section semver per § 12.4. Independent of other sections.

team_identity.description: Mirrors long-lived data from team-configs/<slug>.yaml. Role identifiers only — no person names per § 14.2.

team_size.description: Number of people on the compensation/HR team.

roles_present.description: Role identifiers present on the team.

pointer_to_full_profile.description: Relative path to the full team config file (e.g., 'team-configs/acme.yaml').

diagnosed_waste_patterns.description: Org-level waste patterns surfaced across cycles.

pattern.description: Description of the waste pattern (e.g., 'manual market-data re-entry').

diagnosed_cycle.description: Cycle slug where this pattern was first diagnosed.

severity.description: Impact severity of this waste pattern on the team.

quarterly_roadmap_pointers.description: Pointers to quarterly roadmap files produced by comp-team-transformer.

roadmap_file.description: Relative path to the roadmap file.

cycle_state_pointers.description: Per-cycle state file pointers. Actual cycle data lives in cycle_dir/transformer/.

state_file.description: Relative path to the per-cycle transformer state file.

pre_engagement_artifacts.description: Pre-engagement artifacts produced before or outside the canonical chain. NOT included in closed-engagement drift queries.

artifact_slug.description: Stable identifier for this pre-engagement artifact.

engagement_mode.description: The partial-flow mode used to produce this artifact. Only discovery-only qualifies as pre_engagement shape for transformer; other modes are partial or standalone.

created_date.description: ISO date when the artifact was created.

intended_drive_path.description: Intended Drive path for the artifact file.

decision_log_ref.description: Pointer to the decision_log entry (dl-NNN) that captures the mode-selection rationale, typically decision_type: null_out_rules_pending_v1_1.

diagnosed_waste_patterns.pattern: duplicate HRIS export steps for each line
